# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.456 — Authority of State Auditor

This subchapter or other law related to the operation of the department’s compliance program does not preempt the authority of the state auditor to conduct an audit or investigation under Chapter 321 (State Auditor) , Government Code, or other law.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 15(a), eff. September 1, 2011.*
